title: Polish Style Pork Skillet
description: A hearty and savory dish inspired by traditional Polish cuisine, featuring tender pork and a flavorful skillet.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the pork cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced Polish sausage to the skillet and cook until browned, about 3 minutes.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced potato to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the toasted caraway seeds, salt, and pepper to the skillet, and stir to combine.
Return the pork to the skillet and stir to combine with the other ingredients.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the pork is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
